# FinBuddy - Financial Literacy Gamification App

This is a Next.js 14 project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for a financial literacy gamification platform.

## Project Structure
- Dashboard with XP/Level/Streak system
- Budget tracking interface
- Quiz mining feature for earning XP
- Future investment calculator
- AI Guide chatbot

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Dark theme UI
